ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "stereotype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stereotype of the component */,
  "base_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base class of the component */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent component (if applicable) */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the component */,
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constraint applied to the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated, archived) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the component */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility level of the component (e.g., public, private, team-specific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_base_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_class_id") REFERENCES base_classes ("base_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_stereotype_id FOREIGN KEY ("stereotype_id") REFERENCES stereotypes ("stereotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_constraint_id FOREIGN KEY ("constraint_id") REFERENCES constraints ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stereotypes" (
  "stereotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stereotype */,
  "stereotype_name" TEXT /* Name of the stereotype (e.g., CCMFactory, CCMFinder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stereotype */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stereotype was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stereotype was last updated */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the stereotype is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stereotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "base_classes" (
  "base_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each base class */,
  "base_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the base class (e.g., Operation, Port, Artifact) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the base class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the base class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the base class was last updated */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the base class is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("base_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent component */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parent component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parent component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parent component was last updated */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the parent component is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tag is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constraint */,
  "constraint_name" TEXT /* Name of the constraint */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the constraint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the constraint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the constraint was last updated */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the constraint is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that initiated the interaction */,
  "interacted_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that was interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., method call, data exchange) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_interactions_interacted_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("interacted_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_interactions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that was versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was versioned */,
  "version_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
